revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-1-255

Nominal Range (of a light)

The nominal range of a light used as an aid to marine navigation is its luminous range in a homogeneous atmosphere in which the meteorological visibility (2-1-280) is 10 sea-miles.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Nominal Range}}
